attributes.description: Overview of all CrowdStrike data streams.

params.markdown:
## CrowdStrike integration overview

This dashboard is the entry point for the CrowdStrike integration. It summarizes activity across all enabled data streams: Falcon event telemetry, FDR, Alerts (API), Host inventory, Vulnerability findings, and Identity Protection timeline and assessment data.

The KPI row shows volume or risk signal per stream—FDR alerts, Falcon detections, high and critical alerts, managed hosts, open vulnerabilities, IDP timeline events, and high-risk assessed domains. The time series below compares event volume by data stream over the selected period.

Use the navigation links to open detailed dashboards for each area. Filter by **Hostname**, **Datastream**, or **Event Type** where applicable. Not every stream is enabled in every deployment; empty metrics usually mean that input is not configured or no data has been ingested yet.
